rationale: The citing paper references Cheng et al. (2017) only as part of grouped background citations to support a broad claim that some consumers hold a 'no pain, no gain' belief. It does not single out this paper for specific hypothesis development, construct operationalization, or method reuse, and it does not test Protestant Work Ethic mechanisms from that study. The citation functions as general literature context rather than a distinct building block in the paper's core token-effort theory.
